steps.title: Identify what expanded
steps.content: The claim states that as nueva canción spread beyond Chile, the breadth of musical traditions incorporated into its foundation expanded. The key signal is the need to show NEW musical traditions from different regions being incorporated.

steps.title: Match the musical traditions to the choices
steps.content: B directly illustrates this: corrido, a Mexican musical tradition, became stylistically influential in nueva canción as the movement spread, showing that the foundation incorporated new traditions from other Latin American countries. The other three address thematic content, instrument continuity, or artist geography rather than the incorporation of new musical traditions. That matches choice B — B is correct.
